chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْمِنْبَرِ وَ الرَّوْضَةِ وَ مَقَامِ النَّبِيِّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 217 – The Pulpit, and the garden, and place of the Prophet<sup>saww</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/269)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/269)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) الصَّلَاةُ فِي بَيْتِ  فَاطِمَةَ ( عليها السلام ) أَفْضَلُ أَوْ فِي الرَّوْضَةِ قَالَ فِي بَيْتِ  فَاطِمَةَ ( عليها السلام ) .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Fazzal, from Yunus Bin Yaqoub who said,
‘I said to Abu Abdullahasws, ‘Is the Salaat prayed in the house of Syeda Fatimaasws superior or if prayed in the Garden?’ Heasws said: ‘(The one prayed) in the house of Syeda Fatimaasws’.
en.sarwar: 13. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn Faddal from Yunus ibn Ya’qub who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, ‘Is performing salat (prayer) in the house of Fatimah, ‘Alayha al-Salam, more virtuous or in al-Rawdah?’ He (the Imam) replied, ‘Performing salat (prayer) in the house of Fatimah, ‘Alayha al-Salam, is more virtuous.’”
